---
name: Knowledge Update
about: Suggest new medical/survival knowledge to add to the RAG system
title: "[Knowledge] "
labels: knowledge, content
assignees: ""
---

## Topic

What medical or survival topic should be added or updated?

## Content

Provide the information to add. Include:
- Source (medical guidelines, textbook, WHO, etc.)
- Language (English, Arabic, etc.)
- Accuracy level (verified by medical professional? peer-reviewed?)

## Why This Matters

How does this knowledge help users in emergency situations?

## Existing Coverage

Is this topic partially covered already? What's missing?

## Checklist

- [ ] Information is from a reliable medical/survival source
- [ ] Content is factual and not opinion-based
- [ ] Content follows the existing Markdown format in `app/knowledge/`
- [ ] I've checked this isn't a duplicate of existing knowledge
